title: 50ml Air Dry Clay Glaze，Air Dry Clay Varnish for Airdry Clay，Clay Varnish for Air Drying Clay Can Used to Prevent Clay Cracking, Scratches, and Wear,It Can Also Having a Glossy Glaze Effect (Gloss)
features: Gloss Varnish for Air Dry Clay: Varnish for air dry clay prevents air drying clay from drying out cracks, scratches, scuffs and abrasions on the clay, varnish for air dry clay is also waterproof and fireproof, and dries to transparent, high gloss finish

Gloss Glaze: Clay glaze for air drying clay can make the clay with a layer of bright effect glaze protective film, protect your perfect works, let your works always bright, specially designed for air-drying pottery clay

Steps to Use: 1. After the clay work is dry, give it a thick layer of white acrylic primer, 2. Wait for the primer to dry, then apply the desired color, 3. Wait for the color to dry, then apply our air dry clay paint, it takes 24 hours for clay varnish to dry completely!

Widely Used: Clay paint for air drying clay can be used on clay, plaster, colored porcelain, pre-painted metal, wood, jewelry, simulated and artificial flowers, etc, providing them with a strong protective film
Note: While your varnish for clay creations can come in contact with water, they are not food safe or dishwasher safe. If you encounter any problems during use, please do not hesitate to contact us
